name: Ephemeral Session Identifiers
summary: Use short-lived, rotating session identifiers scoped to one context to minimize cross-service correlation.

trust_boundary_notes: Rotate subject identifiers when crossing API gateway boundaries.
data_flow_constraints: Disallow persistent IDs in telemetry events.
logging_guidance: Log only pseudonymous identifiers for this flow.
Apply role-based access and short retention to privacy-sensitive traces.
